title: agapanthus coddii
intro: Agapanthus coddii, also known as the Codd's agapanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agapanthus coddii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. In traditional medicine, Agapanthus coddii is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
